title: Flock Credibility Lost as It Repeatedly Lies to City Councils, Police, & Public
summary: This article from the ACLU criticizes Flock Safety, a company providing AI-powered license plate recognition (ALPR) cameras to law enforcement, for repeatedly making false or misleading claims to city councils, police, and the public about its technology's accuracy, privacy protections, and effectiveness. The piece highlights concerns about surveillance overreach and corporate accountability.
